info.title: SlashMyBill FinOpsPlatform Action Group
info.description: FinOps platform tools for budgets, settings, commitment coverage, tag compliance, and business metrics

post.summary: Get budget configurations and spend tracking
post.description: Returns budget definitions with current spend, forecasted spend, and alert thresholds for the account

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Budget data including spend and forecast for each configured budget

post.summary: Get FinOps settings and healthcheck status
post.description: Returns FinOps configuration settings and healthcheck scan results for the account including cost allocation tags, billing preferences, and governance controls

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: FinOps settings healthcheck results including configuration status and recommendations

post.description: Returns coverage analysis for commitment-based discounts including reserved instances, savings plans, and committed use discounts showing utilization and coverage gaps

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Commitment coverage data including utilization rates and coverage gaps

post.description: Returns tagging compliance analysis showing which resources meet tagging policies, untagged resource counts, and compliance percentage by service category

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Tag compliance data including compliance rates and untagged resource details

post.summary: Get business-level cost and efficiency metrics
post.description: Returns high-level business metrics including cost per unit, efficiency ratios, and financial KPIs that map cloud spend to business outcomes

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Business metrics including cost efficiency KPIs and unit economics
